components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The principal action on a task surface.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-on-primary); padding: 0 16px; font: 600 14px/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover); } .ds-button-primary:active { background: var(--color-primary-active); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0 16px; font: 600 14px/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-surface-muted); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-ink); font: 600 14px/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 8px 12px; font: 400 16px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Selected Navigation
components.description: Current location in the academic workspace.
components.css: .ds-nav-selected { display: flex; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: var(--color-selected-bg); color: var(--color-selected-text); padding: 0 12px; font: 600 14px/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-selected:hover { background: var(--color-primary-soft-hover); } .ds-nav-selected:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Work Surface
components.description: A structured container for one coherent academic task.
components.css: .ds-work-surface { border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-text); padding: 24px; } .ds-work-surface h3 { margin: 0; color: var(--color-ink); font: 600 20px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-work-surface p { margin: 8px 0 0; font: 400 16px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: UniPilot AI feels like a study space arranged before a demanding week: every tool has a place, the next action is visible, and decoration never competes with work.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color with one deep primary accent.
Compact hierarchy for repeated daily use.
Brighter work surfaces over a warm low-chroma canvas.
Familiar controls with explicit states and keyboard behavior.
Structural adaptation at mobile, tablet, and desktop widths.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: Primary green occupies no more than roughly ten percent of a screen; rarity preserves action hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A bordered component does not also receive a wide decorative shadow.

dos: Do keep academic actions visible and phrase them as direct verbs.
Do preserve focus, semantics, non-color meaning, and reduced motion.
Do label unfinished behavior honestly as a foundation.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism, excessive gradients, gradient text, AI sparkles, or generic AI-SaaS styling.
Don't use oversized rounded cards, identical icon-card grids, hero metrics, or nested cards.
Don't simulate CRUD, AI, GPA, timers, APIs, authentication, or academic data.
